prompt: You are an AI-audio detection classifier for a music streaming platform. Listen to the uploaded track and determine whether it is an original human composition or AI-generated synthetic audio. Report your verdict (human-authored or AI-generated) and the basis for that decision.

32.output: Listen to the track and evaluate if it resembles a composition produced by a human or an AI. If it resembles a human-produced track, mark it as such; if it more closely resembles an AI-generated sound, label it as such. The evaluation should be based on the auditory characteristics of the track.
